title: About me
paragraphs: I am Gerardo Maldonado Félix, a Software Engineering student focused on web development and on building clear, useful, and maintainable solutions.
I mainly work with TypeScript, Node.js, React, Next.js, and SQL, moving across backend, frontend, and integration based on each project needs.
I am interested in solving real problems, optimizing processes, and taking ideas from requirements to a functional and polished delivery.

cards.title: Process optimization
cards.description: I focus on improving flow and performance in development and technical solutions.

cards.title: From requirements to deployment
cards.description: I participate in analysis, implementation, testing, and delivery in real environments.

cards.title: Scalability and efficiency
cards.description: Priority on maintainable, clear solutions aligned with business needs.
